title: Vertiv Alarm
description: An active alarm in the Vertiv Environet Alert DCIM monitoring system

alarmSource.description: Source device, sensor, or asset generating the alarm

message.description: Descriptive alarm message with threshold and current values

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the alarm was triggered

siteName.description: Data center site name where the alarm originated

acknowledged.description: Whether the alarm has been acknowledged by an operator
